seo.title: Rescue Your AI Project (AI Plumber) | SSW
seo.description: Stuck with a half-built or failing AI project? SSW are the AI Plumbers - we rescue struggling AI and vibe-coded builds and turn them into reliable, secure, production-ready solutions.

blocks.heading: Stuck with a **half-built AI mess?** Meet your AI Plumbers
blocks.description: Lots of businesses experiment with AI and vibe coding, then end up with a half-working prototype that can't go live. SSW are the AI Plumbers - we rescue struggling AI projects, fix what's broken, and turn them into reliable, secure, production-ready solutions.

mediaConfiguration.altText: How vibe coding leaves you with an AI mess - and how SSW fixes it

blocks.heading: Trusted in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Newcastle by

cards.heading: Diagnose the Damage
cards.description: We audit your AI build to find what's broken, what's risky, and what's worth keeping - then give you a clear, honest path forward. No judgment.

cards.heading: Fix the Plumbing
cards.description: Our engineers refactor the leaky code, plug the security holes, and replace the duct-tape with solid, maintainable foundations that won't burst under load.

cards.heading: Make it Production-Ready
cards.description: We harden, test, and ship your AI solution so it's secure, scalable, and ready for real users - backed by SSW's expert developers.

accordionItems.label: What is an "AI Plumber"?
accordionItems.content: It's our nickname for what we do. Businesses experiment with AI and vibe coding and end up with a half-working, leaky mess. We come in, find the problems, fix the plumbing, and make everything flow reliably in production.

accordionItems.label: My AI project sort of works but feels fragile. Can you help?
accordionItems.content: Yes - that's exactly what we specialise in. We assess what you have, stabilise it, and turn a fragile prototype into a dependable, production-grade system.

accordionItems.label: Do I have to throw away what I've already built?
accordionItems.content: Usually not. We keep what's valuable, refactor what's risky, and only rebuild what genuinely needs it. The goal is to protect your existing investment, not start from scratch.

accordionItems.label: What kinds of AI projects do you rescue?
accordionItems.content: Chatbots, copilots, RAG systems, automations, vibe-coded prototypes, and AI features bolted onto existing apps - anything that started promising but stalled before production.

accordionItems.label: How do you make an AI project "production-ready"?
accordionItems.content: We add proper security and compliance guardrails, automated testing, observability, and scalable architecture - so your solution stays powerful, safe, and maintainable as it grows.

accordionItems.label: What happens in the free initial meeting?
accordionItems.content: In this meeting, you'll talk with one of our experienced Solution Architects and your Account Manager. You can discuss your project, what's gone wrong, and your goals. We'll listen, ask questions, offer initial thoughts on how to get it back on track, and determine if SSW is the right fit to help. There's no obligation.

blocks.heading: Let's get your **AI project** back on track
blocks.description: Connect with our Account Managers to discuss how we can rescue your AI project and make it production-ready.
